# Hydra Swarm Audit — Shared Baseline
# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE — read-only reference for all swarm agents
# Generated 2026-05-05 on master branch

## Project Structure
- Root: ~/Desktop/hydra
- Electron: electron/main.js (orchestrator) + electron/app/ (modules: env, ipc, schemaSync, shutdown, windows)
- Server: server/index.js + server/services/ + server/lib/ + server/routes/
- Frontend: src/ (React 19 + Vite), dist/ (build output)
- Scripts: scripts/ (build, prepare, launch, gate, smoke)
- Config: vite.config.js, electron-builder.yml, package.json
- Docs: docs/ (PACKAGING.md, ELECTRON_MIGRATION_STATUS.md, SUPPORT_BUNDLE.md, etc)

## Already Verified (PASS — don't re-check unless you find contradictions)
1. Bundled chromium wired via electron-builder.yml extraResources + playwright-browser.js resolution
2. Per-install JWT secret in env.js ensurePackagedRuntimeState (randomBytes 32, mode 0o600)
3. Packaged uses self-heal, Prisma CLI only in dev — schemaSync.js if(!isDev) guard
4. Empty DB wired: build-empty-db.mjs → prepare-resources → builder → env copy at launch
5. webSecurity:true + contextIsolation + sandbox + no nodeIntegration on BrowserWindows
6. CORS restricted for embedded: loopback-only origin check in server/index.js
7. Shutdown requires confirm token 'SHUTDOWN_HYDRA' in embedded mode
8. Async close dialog (dialog.showMessageBox, not sync)
9. External URL allowlist: github.com + openrouter.ai in env.js
10. Logger removes emoji in prod, file transport via HYDRA_DATA_DIR
11. health-pinger uses config OR_BASE, not hardcoded localhost:3001
12. vite.config uses HYDRA_SERVER_PORT for proxy target
13. Settings.jsx has diagnostics + native version info
14. client-logger.js at src/lib/
15. All tests pass: gate 12/12, electron-server-extract 2/2, electron-data-path 2/2, electron-launch-compat 3/3
16. All 67 files pass node --check
17. No duplicate entitlements
18. build-empty-db.mjs uses execFileSync
19. launch.js uses db-self-heal
20. bin/hydra.mjs has doctor/logs/data-dir/version subcommands
21. docs/PACKAGING.md, ELECTRON_MIGRATION_STATUS.md exist
22. Launch Hydra.command fixed with build detection

## Key File Paths (for reference)
- electron/app/env.js — paths, ensurePackagedRuntimeState
- electron/app/windows.js — createSplashWindow, createMainWindow
- electron/app/schemaSync.js — schema sync + self-heal
- electron/app/shutdown.js — graceful shutdown
- electron/app/ipc.js — IPC handlers
- electron/main.js — lifecycle orchestrator
- server/index.js — Express app + bootstrap + shutdown
- server/lib/db-self-heal.js — migration SQL replay
- server/lib/playwright-browser.js — chromium resolution
- scripts/launch.js — terminal launcher
- scripts/build-empty-db.mjs — empty DB generator
- scripts/prepare-electron-resources.mjs — chromium + DB copy
- electron-builder.yml — packaging config

## Known Gaps (potential issues to investigate)
- electron/app/shutdown.js existence and wiring
- First-run experience / setup wizard
- Error states for missing Chromium, DB corruption, port conflicts
- Keyboard shortcuts
- Splash screen phase indicators
- Cross-platform path handling (Windows/Linux)
- Graceful shutdown timeout telemetry
- Preload contextBridge API surface audit
- menu wiring with setupAppMenu
- tray status states (normal/disabled/error)
- Support bundle export wiring
- About panel details
- DB backup before self-heal
- Migration lock for concurrent instances
